backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Fixes 1.8.18 startup-hang regression — SolidWorks Interop DLLs are now bundled into the single-file binary so the agent loads on every workstation (1.8.18 JIT-faulted at first request with FileNotFoundException). Plus a defensive StartWebHost restructure so Kestrel binds before any singleton resolution, making any future ctor failure visible in the daily log instead of presenting as a silent hang.
